title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
